title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people making a salad. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A mother and her son are making a salad in a kitchen. The boy is putting tomatoes into a large bowl while his mother is cutting a cucumber. There are vegetables, plates and a bottle of oil on the table.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people playing mini golf. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Two children are playing mini golf outdoors. One child is using a golf club to hit a small ball while the other is watching. There are colourful obstacles, grass and families in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
